MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Ella Harris.

The sale was confirmed at $525,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 9, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.
